mapper.insert:
SELECT SNACKSEQ.NEXTVAL FROM dual
INSERT INTO snackRequest ( snackId, itemName, quantity, reason, status, regDate, requesterEmpId ) VALUES ( #{snackId}, #{itemName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{quantity}, #{reason, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'PENDING', SYSDATE, #{requesterEmpId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.update: UPDATE snackRequest SET status = #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, adminComment = #{adminComment, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, updateDate = SYSDATE WHERE snackId = #{snackId}
mapper.select:
SELECT s.snackId, s.itemName, s.quantity, s.reason, s.status, TO_CHAR(s.regDate, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS regDate, TO_CHAR(s.updateDate, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS updateDate, s.requesterEmpId, e.name AS requesterName, s.adminComment, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM snackVote v WHERE v.snackId = s.snackId) AS voteCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM snackVote v2 WHERE v2.snackId = s.snackId AND v2.empId = #{empId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS voted FROM snackRequest s LEFT JOIN employee2 e ON s.requesterEmpId = e.empId WHERE s.status != 'DELETED'
AND s.status = #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
AND (s.itemName LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR s.reason LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%')
ORDER BY s.snackId DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{pageSize} ROWS ONLY

SELECT s.snackId, s.itemName, s.quantity, s.reason, s.status, TO_CHAR(s.regDate, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS regDate, TO_CHAR(s.updateDate, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS updateDate, s.requesterEmpId, e.name AS requesterName, s.adminComment, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM snackVote v WHERE v.snackId = s.snackId) AS voteCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM snackVote v2 WHERE v2.snackId = s.snackId AND v2.empId = #{empId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS voted FROM snackRequest s LEFT JOIN employee2 e ON s.requesterEmpId = e.empId WHERE s.snackId = #{snackId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO snackVote (snackId, empId, regDate) VALUES (#{snackId}, #{empId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE)
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM snackVote WHERE snackId = #{snackId}
mapper.insert:
SELECT SNACKCOMMENTSEQ.NEXTVAL FROM dual
INSERT INTO snackComment (commentId, snackId, content, authorEmpId, regDate) VALUES ( #{commentId}, #{snackId}, #{content, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{authorEmpId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT c.commentId, c.snackId, c.content, TO_CHAR(c.regDate, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS regDate, c.authorEmpId, e.name AS authorName FROM snackComment c LEFT JOIN employee2 e ON c.authorEmpId = e.empId WHERE c.snackId = #{snackId} ORDER BY c.commentId ASC
